basic_details.job_title: EMRS Jashpur Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 48 TGT, Counselor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: School-level Sanchalan Samiti under District Level Adim Jati Kalyan Awasiya evam Ashram Educational Institution Committee, Jashpur
basic_details.post_name: PGT Guest Teacher, TGT Guest Teacher, Counsellor, Staff Nurse (non-teaching)
basic_details.application_mode: Offline - by registered post or in person at the respective school's current campus address
basic_details.short_information: The Eklavya Model Residential Schools (EMRS) in Jashpur district, Chhattisgarh, have released separate press notifications for guest teacher, counsellor and staff nurse recruitment for the 2026-27 academic session. Five schools - EMRS Farsabahar, EMRS Sanna, EMRS Dhudhrudand (with Baraikela), EMRS Manora, and EMRS Gholeng - are together inviting applications for 48 posts on a temporary, contractual (guest teacher) basis under the National Education Society for Tribal Students (NESTS), Ministry of Tribal Affairs, Government of India.

important_dates.raw: Application start date: 09 July 2026 Application last date: 20 July 2026 (10:00 AM to 5:00 PM) Walk-in interview: 23 July 2026, 24 July 2026, and 25 July 2026 (post-wise schedule varies by school - see below) Reporting time for interview: 10:00 AM onwards

application_fee.details: Not mentioned in the official notification. None of the five press notices specify an application fee amount, payment mode, or fee exemption for any category. Candidates should check the official website (https://Jashpur.nic.in) for any updates before applying.

age_limit.details: Age proof will be based on the marksheet issued by the Board for the High School Certificate Examination, or a marksheet/certificate issued by a competent authority. Age relaxation for ST/SC/OBC and other categories will be given as per Government of India norms. (The notification does not specify an age limit for the Counsellor post separately.)

qualification.details: Post-graduate degree from a recognised university in the relevant subject (Chemistry, English, Economics, History, Geography, Political Science, Biology, Hindi, etc.) B.Ed degree (not required if the candidate holds an integrated 4-year degree) | M.Sc (Computer Science/IT) or MCA from a recognised university/institute, OR M.E./M.Tech (Computer Science/IT) from a recognised university/institute | Four-year integrated degree course from a Regional College of Education (NCERT) or other NCTE-recognised institution in the concerned subject, OR Bachelor's Honours degree in the concerned subject (subject studied for at least 2 years in a 3-year degree course), OR Bachelor's degree from a recognised university with the subject studied in all three years of the degree course Subject-specific combinations apply for TGT Hindi, English, Maths, Science, Social Studies and Sanskrit (see the official notification for full clause-wise detail) Must have passed CTET (Central Teacher Eligibility Test) conducted by CBSE as per NCTE guidelines B.Ed degree (not required for the 4-year integrated degree course) Competence to teach through English and Hindi | Note: If CTET Paper-II qualified candidates are not available for TGT posts, State TET (CG TET Paper-II) qualified candidates may be considered. | Bachelor's degree in Music from a recognised university/institute. | Bachelor's degree in Fine Art/Craft from a recognised university, OR Fine Art with B.Ed from a Regional College of Education. | Bachelor's degree in Physical Education from a recognised university/institute. | Bachelor's degree (Hons.) in Nursing from a recognised university, OR Bachelor's degree in Nursing from a recognised university, OR Post Basic B.Sc Nursing from a recognised university/institute, PLUS registration as a Nurse or Nurse (MW) with the State Nursing Council, PLUS 2.5 years of experience in a hospital with 50 or more beds (applicable in the Post Basic B.Sc case) | Master's Degree in Psychology/Clinical Psychology from a recognised university One-year Diploma in Guidance & Counselling from a recognised university or institution Must have studied the local language of the state (Chhattisgarhi/Hindi) up to Class VIII

selection_process: Work experience (max 5 marks: 1 mark/year up to 5 years) Up to 5 marks
Medium of instruction - English throughout school & college 5 marks (4 marks if only college was English medium; 2 marks if only up to Higher Secondary)
Work experience (max 5 marks) Up to 5 marks
Medium of instruction (English) Up to 5 marks
Selection is based on a merit list prepared from the candidate's academic qualification marks
and Walk-in Interview marks. There is no written examination. The weightage differs by post category:
Work experience marks (all posts): 1 year = 1 mark
5 years or more = maximum 5 marks. Experience beyond 3 years counting less than 6 months is not rounded up to a full year
and experience of less than 6 months earns no marks.
how_to_apply: Download the application form (Parishisht-2 / Guest Teacher Application Form) from the press notification for the specific school, or from https://Jashpur.nic.in.
Fill in the form with complete personal details, educational qualifications, and experience details.
Attach all required documents listed above, along with 3 passport-size photographs.

Submit the completed application, either by registered post or in person, at the current campus/office address of the respective EMRS school (see school-wise addresses above) between 9 July 2026 and 20 July 2026, from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
Applicants applying for more than one post must submit a separate application for each post.
Shortlisted/eligible candidates must appear for the Walk-in Interview at Zila Panchayat Sabhagar, Jashpur, on the date assigned to their post, at 10:00 AM.
important_instructions: Incomplete, unclear, or incorrect applications will be rejected without prior notice. Once submitted, no correction/modification of the application is allowed. If data filled in the form does not match the original documents at verification, the candidature will be cancelled. Any amendment to the notification will be updated on https://Jashpur.nic.in and/or published in local newspapers. The institution is not responsible if a candidate provides an incorrect email ID or mobile number. A school-level committee will scrutinise applications and prepare the merit list; the final merit list is issued after committee approval. In case of any dispute, the decision of the district-level committee is final. The number of vacancies shown can be increased, decreased, or the notification can be cancelled for sufficient reasons. The candidate's entire educational qualification must be completed before the date of notification issue; qualifications acquired after the notification date will not be considered valid. Reservation roster is not applicable, as each EMRS school's setup is separate and posts are standalone/single (एकाकी पद). Guest teacher engagement is purely temporary for the 2026-27 academic session, or until regular recruitment against the post - whichever is earlier. Services can be terminated at any time without notice. Guest teachers are entitled to only 8 casual leaves in a year. No appointment letter/work order will be issued to guest teachers. Selected candidates must submit a self-declared affidavit (on ₹50 non-judicial stamp paper) stating the engagement is purely ad-hoc/outsourced and that they will not claim any right to regularisation in future. Working hours for guest teachers will be the same as for regular teachers.

content_sections.heading: EMRS Jashpur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the EMRS Jashpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download EMRS Gholeng District Jashpur Job 2026 Notification PDF Download EMRS Manora District Jashpur Job 2026 Notification PDF Download EMRS Dhudhurudand District Jashpur Job 2026 Notification PDF Download EMRS Sanna District Jashpur Job 2026 Notification PDF Download EMRS Farsabahar District Jashpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: EMRS Jashpur Important Dates
content_sections.text: Application start date: 09 July 2026 Application last date: 20 July 2026 (10:00 AM to 5:00 PM) Walk-in interview: 23 July 2026, 24 July 2026, and 25 July 2026 (post-wise schedule varies by school - see below) Reporting time for interview: 10:00 AM onwards

content_sections.heading: EMRS Jashpur Vacancy Details (School-wise)
content_sections.text: Interview schedule: 23 July 2026 - TGT PET (Female), Staff Nurse; 24 July 2026 - TGT Maths, TGT Music, Counsellor. Application submission address: Shasakiya Uchchtar Madhyamik Vidyalaya Farsabahar (SEJES Farsabahar), Vikaskhand Farsabahar. Interview schedule: 23 July 2026 - PGT Chemistry, PGT History, Staff Nurse; 25 July 2026 - PGT Economics, PGT English, TGT Art. Application submission address: EMRS Sanna, Vikaskhand Bagicha, District Jashpur. Interview schedule: 23 July 2026 - PGT Chemistry, PGT History, TGT PET; 24 July 2026 - PGT Biology, PGT Political Science, PGT Geography, TGT Maths, TGT Social Science, TGT Music; 25 July 2026 - PGT Economics, PGT English, PGT Computer Science, Counsellor. Application submission address: Pre-Matric Kanya Chhatravas, Baraikela (Ganjutoli), Vikaskhand Kansabel Nagar. Note: This notification states the engagement is valid till 31 March 2027 or until regular appointment against these posts, whichever is earlier - this timeline is slightly different from the "2026-27 session" wording used in the other four schools' notifications. Interview schedule: 23 July 2026 - TGT Hindi, TGT PET (Female/Male), Staff Nurse; 24 July 2026 - TGT Maths, TGT Social Science, TGT Music, Counsellor; 25 July 2026 - TGT Science, TGT English, TGT Art. Application submission address: Shasakiya Uchchtar Madhyamik Vidyalaya Ara (Naya Bhawan), Vikaskhand Jashpur Nagar. Interview schedule: 23 July 2026 - PGT Chemistry, PGT History, TGT PET (Female), Staff Nurse; 24 July 2026 - PGT Biology, PGT Geography, TGT Social Science, TGT Maths, TGT Music, Counsellor; 25 July 2026 - PGT Computer Science, TGT English. Application submission address: Baghima, Vikaskhand Jashpur Nagar.

content_sections.heading: EMRS Jashpur Eligibility / Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Post-graduate degree from a recognised university in the relevant subject (Chemistry, English, Economics, History, Geography, Political Science, Biology, Hindi, etc.) B.Ed degree (not required if the candidate holds an integrated 4-year degree) M.Sc (Computer Science/IT) or MCA from a recognised university/institute, OR M.E./M.Tech (Computer Science/IT) from a recognised university/institute Four-year integrated degree course from a Regional College of Education (NCERT) or other NCTE-recognised institution in the concerned subject, OR Bachelor's Honours degree in the concerned subject (subject studied for at least 2 years in a 3-year degree course), OR Bachelor's degree from a recognised university with the subject studied in all three years of the degree course Subject-specific combinations apply for TGT Hindi, English, Maths, Science, Social Studies and Sanskrit (see the official notification for full clause-wise detail) Must have passed CTET (Central Teacher Eligibility Test) conducted by CBSE as per NCTE guidelines B.Ed degree (not required for the 4-year integrated degree course) Competence to teach through English and Hindi Note: If CTET Paper-II qualified candidates are not available for TGT posts, State TET (CG TET Paper-II) qualified candidates may be considered. Bachelor's degree in Music from a recognised university/institute. Bachelor's degree in Fine Art/Craft from a recognised university, OR Fine Art with B.Ed from a Regional College of Education. Bachelor's degree in Physical Education from a recognised university/institute. Bachelor's degree (Hons.) in Nursing from a recognised university, OR Bachelor's degree in Nursing from a recognised university, OR Post Basic B.Sc Nursing from a recognised university/institute, PLUS registration as a Nurse or Nurse (MW) with the State Nursing Council, PLUS 2.5 years of experience in a hospital with 50 or more beds (applicable in the Post Basic B.Sc case) Master's Degree in Psychology/Clinical Psychology from a recognised university One-year Diploma in Guidance & Counselling from a recognised university or institution Must have studied the local language of the state (Chhattisgarhi/Hindi) up to Class VIII

content_sections.heading: EMRS Jashpur Age Limit (as on 01.01.2026)
content_sections.text: Age proof will be based on the marksheet issued by the Board for the High School Certificate Examination, or a marksheet/certificate issued by a competent authority. Age relaxation for ST/SC/OBC and other categories will be given as per Government of India norms. (The notification does not specify an age limit for the Counsellor post separately.)

content_sections.heading: EMRS Jashpur Application Fee
content_sections.text: Not mentioned in the official notification. None of the five press notices specify an application fee amount, payment mode, or fee exemption for any category. Candidates should check the official website (https://Jashpur.nic.in) for any updates before applying.

content_sections.heading: EMRS Jashpur Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection is based on a merit list prepared from the candidate's academic qualification marks, additional experience marks, and Walk-in Interview marks. There is no written examination. The weightage differs by post category: Work experience marks (all posts): 1 year = 1 mark, 2 years = 2 marks, 3 years = 3 marks, 4 years = 4 marks, 5 years or more = maximum 5 marks. Experience beyond 3 years counting less than 6 months is not rounded up to a full year, and experience of less than 6 months earns no marks.

rows.component: Work experience (max 5 marks: 1 mark/year up to 5 years)
Medium of instruction - English throughout school & college
rows.weightage: 5 marks (4 marks if only college was English medium; 2 marks if only up to Higher Secondary)

content_sections.heading: EMRS Jashpur Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates must carry/attach the following documents with their application: High School Certificate marksheet/certificate Higher Secondary School Certificate marksheet/certificate Graduation marksheet/certificate Post-Graduation marksheet/certificate B.Ed/B.P.Ed passing marksheet/certificate CTET/CG TET passing marksheet/certificate Work experience certificate Any other additional diploma/certificate Chhattisgarh domicile (Residence) certificate issued by a competent authority One attested set of all certificates 3 passport-size colour photographs Aadhaar Card

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for EMRS Jashpur Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download the application form (Parishisht-2 / Guest Teacher Application Form) from the press notification for the specific school, or from https://Jashpur.nic.in. Fill in the form with complete personal details, educational qualifications, and experience details. Attach all required documents listed above, along with 3 passport-size photographs. Submit the completed application, either by registered post or in person, at the current campus/office address of the respective EMRS school (see school-wise addresses above) between 9 July 2026 and 20 July 2026, from 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM. Applicants applying for more than one post must submit a separate application for each post. Shortlisted/eligible candidates must appear for the Walk-in Interview at Zila Panchayat Sabhagar, Jashpur, on the date assigned to their post, at 10:00 AM.

content_sections.heading: EMRS Jashpur Recruitment 2026: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Incomplete, unclear, or incorrect applications will be rejected without prior notice. Once submitted, no correction/modification of the application is allowed. If data filled in the form does not match the original documents at verification, the candidature will be cancelled. Any amendment to the notification will be updated on https://Jashpur.nic.in and/or published in local newspapers. The institution is not responsible if a candidate provides an incorrect email ID or mobile number. A school-level committee will scrutinise applications and prepare the merit list; the final merit list is issued after committee approval. In case of any dispute, the decision of the district-level committee is final. The number of vacancies shown can be increased, decreased, or the notification can be cancelled for sufficient reasons. The candidate's entire educational qualification must be completed before the date of notification issue; qualifications acquired after the notification date will not be considered valid. Reservation roster is not applicable, as each EMRS school's setup is separate and posts are standalone/single (एकाकी पद). Guest teacher engagement is purely temporary for the 2026-27 academic session, or until regular recruitment against the post - whichever is earlier. Services can be terminated at any time without notice. Guest teachers are entitled to only 8 casual leaves in a year. No appointment letter/work order will be issued to guest teachers. Selected candidates must submit a self-declared affidavit (on ₹50 non-judicial stamp paper) stating the engagement is purely ad-hoc/outsourced and that they will not claim any right to regularisation in future. Working hours for guest teachers will be the same as for regular teachers.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for EMRS Jashpur?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled for 23rd July 2026 and 24th July 2026, depending on the post. Candidates should ensure they attend on the correct date for their applied position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by EMRS Jashpur?
faq.answer: EMRS Jashpur has released a total of 48 vacancies for the posts of TGT, Counselor, and Staff Nurse.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the EMRS Jashpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years for all the posts. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the TGT posts?
faq.answer: The salary for TGT posts is either Rs. 33000 or Rs. 29000 per month, depending on the specific TGT role and qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. What are the required qualifications for the Counselor post?
faq.answer: For the Counselor post, candidates need a Master's Degree in Psychology/Clinical Psychology, a one-year Diploma in guidance & counseling, and should have studied the local language up to Class VIII.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for EMRS Jashpur recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes evaluation based on educational qualification marks, a walk-in interview, and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for EMRS Jashpur?
faq.answer: The official website for EMRS Jashpur is https://jashpur.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual, meaning they are offered on a temporary basis for a specified period.
